zh.Diocese of Dublin, Leinster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林
zh.Leinster, Dublin, Ireland: 愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Donnchad Mac Murchada於大約1057年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特時，他的父親Murchad MacDiarmata34歲，母親Sadb Ingen MacBricc24歲。他於大約1090年與Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1115年12月8日在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林享年59歲。

zh-hans.Diocese of Dublin, Leinster, Ireland: 爱尔兰迪 本 度布林
zh-hans.Leinster, Dublin, Ireland: 爱尔兰迪 本 度布林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donnchad Mac Murchada于大约1057年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特时，他的父亲Murchad MacDiarmata34岁，母亲Sadb Ingen MacBricc24岁。他于大约1090年与Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1115年12月8日在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Donnchad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Donnchad Mac Murchada was born about 1057, in Leinster, Ireland, his father, Murchad MacDiarmata, was 34 and his mother, Sadb Ingen MacBricc, was 24. He married Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain about 1090, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 8 December 1115, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donnchad Mac Murchada est né environ 1057, à Leinster, Irlande, son père, Murchad MacDiarmata, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sadb Ingen MacBricc, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain environ 1090, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1115, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donnchad Mac Murchada um 1057 in Leinster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Murchad MacDiarmata 34 und seine Mutter Sadb Ingen MacBricc 24. Er hat um 1090 in Diocese of Dublin, Irland Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1115 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Diocese of Dublin, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchad Mac Murchada è nato il circa 1057 nel Leinster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Murchad MacDiarmata, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Sadb Ingen MacBricc, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain circa 1090, nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 8 dicembre 1115, nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Diocese of Dublin, Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリン
ja.Leinster, Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリン
ja.Donnchadh, Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドダブリン
ja.Leinster, Wexford, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.lifeSummary: Donnchad Mac Murchadaが約1057年にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた時，父Murchad MacDiarmataは34歳，母Sadb Ingen MacBriccは24歳であった。約1090年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンでOrlaith Ingen O'Braenainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1115年12月8日にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Donnchad Mac Murchada(이)가 대략 1057년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Murchad MacDiarmata(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Sadb Ingen MacBricc(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1090년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1115년 12월 8일 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchad Mac Murchada nasceu aproximadamente 1057, em Leinster, Irlanda, seu pai, Murchad MacDiarmata, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Sadb Ingen MacBricc, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain aproximadamente 1090, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1115, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donnchad Mac Murchada родился около 1057 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Murchad MacDiarmata было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sadb Ingen MacBricc, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain около 1090 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 8 декабря 1115 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.from 1098 to 1115: mai le 1098 e o'o I le 1115

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donnchad Mac Murchada nació aproximadamente 1057, en Leinster, Irlanda, su papá, Murchad MacDiarmata, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Sadb Ingen MacBricc, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain aproximadamente 1090, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1115, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 59 años.
